creator: itojun@csl.sony.co.jp
text:
I am sorry, I made a mistake on filename.

I've put the ports by the following name:
	nvi-1.79.m17n-970216.FreeBSD-ports2.tar.gz
however, it has to be:
	nvi-1.79.m17n-970217-1300.FreeBSD-ports2.tar.gz

I believe it is minor problem since ports will be redistributed
by extracted form.
Sorry for your troubles.

itojun
